fields.label: Active
fields.rationale: Setting is_active=1 runs `UPDATE tabWorkflow SET is_active=0 WHERE document_type=<target> AND name != <new>` - only ONE active workflow per DocType can exist, and activating a new one automatically deactivates every other workflow on the same DocType. Default 1 so the workflow takes effect on deploy.

fields.label: Workflow state fieldname
fields.rationale: Names the field on the target DocType that stores the current workflow state. Default 'workflow_state' is the Frappe convention. On first save, Frappe's on_update hook AUTO-CREATES a hidden Custom Field with this fieldname on the target DocType (Link to 'Workflow State', hidden=1, allow_on_submit=1, no_copy=1) - do NOT emit a separate Custom Field item for workflow_state in the changeset. Only customise this fieldname if a field with the default name already exists for another purpose.

fields.label: Override status field
fields.rationale: When 1, the workflow state replaces Frappe's native status field in list / form header. Default 0 runs workflow alongside native status.

fields.label: Send email alert on state change (parent flag)
fields.rationale: Parent-level toggle for Frappe's built-in email-on-transition. Default 0; prefer a dedicated Notification for richer templating. Individual states can override via send_email flag per state row.

fields.label: States (list of Workflow Document State rows)
Transitions (list of {state, action, next_state, allowed, condition?})
